mapper.sql: machine.id AS id, machine.public_id::text AS publicKey, machine.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, machine.modality_id AS modalityId, m.public_id::text AS modalityPublicKey, m.name AS modalityName, m.abbr AS modalityAbbr, machine.machine_name AS machineName, machine.machine_ae_title AS machineAeTitle, machine.machine_host AS machineHost, machine.machine_port AS machinePort, machine.is_active AS isActive, TO_CHAR(machine.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(machine.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS modifiedAt

(CASE WHEN s.ssl_enabled IS TRUE THEN 'https' ELSE 'http' END || '://' || s.ip_address || ':' || s.port) AS baseUrl, (CASE WHEN s.ssl_enabled IS TRUE THEN 'https' ELSE 'http' END || '://' || s.ip_address || ':' || s.port) AS dicomServerUiBaseUrl, ((CASE WHEN s.ssl_enabled IS TRUE THEN 'https' ELSE 'http' END || '://' || s.ip_address || ':' || s.port) || COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(s.dicomweb_path), ''), '/dicom-web')) AS dicomwebBaseUrl, COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(s.dicomweb_path), ''), '/dicom-web') AS dicomwebPath,

s.pacs_result_api_key_hash AS pacsResultApiKeyHash, (s.pacs_result_api_key_hash IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(s.pacs_result_api_key_hash) != '') AS hasPacsResultApiKey, s.storage_directory AS storageDirectory, s.index_directory AS indexDirectory, s.maximum_storage_size AS maximumStorageSize, s.maximum_patient_count AS maximumPatientCount, s.remote_access_allowed AS remoteAccessAllowed, s.http_server_enabled AS httpServerEnabled, s.enable_http_compression AS enableHttpCompression, s.ssl_enabled AS sslEnabled, s.authentication_enabled AS authenticationEnabled, s.authorization_enabled AS authorizationEnabled, s.authorization_root AS authorizationRoot, s.authorization_checked_level AS authorizationCheckedLevel, s.dicom_always_allow_echo AS dicomAlwaysAllowEcho, s.dicom_always_allow_find AS dicomAlwaysAllowFind, s.dicom_always_allow_get AS dicomAlwaysAllowGet, s.dicom_always_allow_move AS dicomAlwaysAllowMove, s.dicom_always_allow_store AS dicomAlwaysAllowStore, s.dicom_check_called_aet AS dicomCheckCalledAet, s.dicom_tls_enabled AS dicomTlsEnabled, s.dicom_scp_timeout AS dicomScpTimeout, s.dicom_peers_json AS dicomPeersJson, s.worklists_enabled AS worklistsEnabled, s.worklists_database AS worklistsDatabase, s.plugins_paths AS pluginsPaths,

LEFT JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs route_cfg ON route_cfg.hospital_id = s.hospital_id AND route_cfg.dicom_server_id = s.id AND route_cfg.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN hospital_modality_server_routes route_info ON route_info.hospital_id = route_cfg.hospital_id AND route_info.routing_config_id = route_cfg.id AND route_info.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN modalities route_modality ON route_modality.id = route_info.modality_id AND route_modality.is_active = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM hospital_dicom_servers s

SELECT s.id AS id, s.public_id::text AS publicKey, s.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, s.name AS name, s.ip_address AS ipAddress, s.port AS port, s.dicom_port AS dicomPort, s.ae_title AS aeTitle,
s.public_health_check_url AS publicHealthCheckUrl, s.viewer_base_url AS viewerBaseUrl, s.pacs_api_callback_base_url AS pacsApiCallbackBaseUrl, s.username AS username, (s.password IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(s.password) != '') AS hasPassword, s.password AS password,
STRING_AGG(DISTINCT route_info.modality_id::text, ',' ORDER BY route_info.modality_id::text) AS modalityIdCsv, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT route_modality.public_id::text, ',' ORDER BY route_modality.public_id::text) AS modalityPublicKeyCsv, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT route_modality.name, ',' ORDER BY route_modality.name) AS modalityNameCsv, s.is_active AS isActive, TO_CHAR(s.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(s.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS modifiedAt FROM hospital_dicom_servers s INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = s.hospital_id
GROUP BY s.id, h.id ORDER BY s.id DESC
LIMIT #{filter.rowsPerPage} OFFSET #{filter.page}

SELECT s.id AS id, s.public_id::text AS publicKey, s.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, s.name AS name, s.ip_address AS ipAddress, s.port AS port, s.dicom_port AS dicomPort, s.ae_title AS aeTitle,
s.public_health_check_url AS publicHealthCheckUrl, s.viewer_base_url AS viewerBaseUrl, s.pacs_api_callback_base_url AS pacsApiCallbackBaseUrl, s.username AS username, (s.password IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(s.password) != '') AS hasPassword, s.password AS password,
STRING_AGG(DISTINCT route_info.modality_id::text, ',' ORDER BY route_info.modality_id::text) AS modalityIdCsv, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT route_modality.public_id::text, ',' ORDER BY route_modality.public_id::text) AS modalityPublicKeyCsv, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT route_modality.name, ',' ORDER BY route_modality.name) AS modalityNameCsv, s.is_active AS isActive, TO_CHAR(s.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(s.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS modifiedAt FROM hospital_dicom_servers s INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = s.hospital_id
WHERE s.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND s.is_active = 1 GROUP BY s.id, h.id ORDER BY CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg WHERE cfg.hospital_id = s.hospital_id AND cfg.dicom_server_id = s.id AND cfg.is_active = 1 ) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, s.id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hospital_dicom_servers ( hospital_id, name, ip_address, port, dicom_port, ae_title, dicomweb_path, public_health_check_url, viewer_base_url, pacs_api_callback_base_url, username, password, pacs_result_api_key_hash, storage_directory, index_directory, maximum_storage_size, maximum_patient_count, remote_access_allowed, http_server_enabled, enable_http_compression, ssl_enabled, authentication_enabled, authorization_enabled, authorization_root, authorization_checked_level, dicom_always_allow_echo, dicom_always_allow_find, dicom_always_allow_get, dicom_always_allow_move, dicom_always_allow_store, dicom_check_called_aet, dicom_tls_enabled, dicom_scp_timeout, dicom_peers_json, worklists_enabled, worklists_database, plugins_paths, is_active, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{hospitalId}, #{name}, #{ipAddress}, #{port}, #{dicomPort}, #{aeTitle}, #{dicomwebPath}, #{publicHealthCheckUrl}, #{viewerBaseUrl}, #{pacsApiCallbackBaseUrl}, #{username}, #{password}, #{pacsResultApiKeyHash}, #{storageDirectory}, #{indexDirectory}, #{maximumStorageSize}, #{maximumPatientCount}, #{remoteAccessAllowed}, #{httpServerEnabled}, #{enableHttpCompression}, #{sslEnabled}, #{authenticationEnabled}, #{authorizationEnabled}, #{authorizationRoot}, #{authorizationCheckedLevel}, #{dicomAlwaysAllowEcho}, #{dicomAlwaysAllowFind}, #{dicomAlwaysAllowGet}, #{dicomAlwaysAllowMove}, #{dicomAlwaysAllowStore}, #{dicomCheckCalledAet}, #{dicomTlsEnabled}, #{dicomScpTimeout}, #{dicomPeersJson}, #{worklistsEnabled}, #{worklistsDatabase}, #{pluginsPaths}, 1, #{createdBy}, #{modifiedBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE hospital_dicom_servers SET name = #{name}, ip_address = #{ipAddress}, port = #{port}, dicom_port = #{dicomPort}, ae_title = #{aeTitle}, dicomweb_path = #{dicomwebPath}, public_health_check_url = #{publicHealthCheckUrl}, viewer_base_url = #{viewerBaseUrl}, pacs_api_callback_base_url = #{pacsApiCallbackBaseUrl}, username = #{username}, password = #{password}, pacs_result_api_key_hash = #{pacsResultApiKeyHash}, storage_directory = #{storageDirectory}, index_directory = #{indexDirectory}, maximum_storage_size = #{maximumStorageSize}, maximum_patient_count = #{maximumPatientCount}, remote_access_allowed = #{remoteAccessAllowed}, http_server_enabled = #{httpServerEnabled}, enable_http_compression = #{enableHttpCompression}, ssl_enabled = #{sslEnabled}, authentication_enabled = #{authenticationEnabled}, authorization_enabled = #{authorizationEnabled}, authorization_root = #{authorizationRoot}, authorization_checked_level = #{authorizationCheckedLevel}, dicom_always_allow_echo = #{dicomAlwaysAllowEcho}, dicom_always_allow_find = #{dicomAlwaysAllowFind}, dicom_always_allow_get = #{dicomAlwaysAllowGet}, dicom_always_allow_move = #{dicomAlwaysAllowMove}, dicom_always_allow_store = #{dicomAlwaysAllowStore}, dicom_check_called_aet = #{dicomCheckCalledAet}, dicom_tls_enabled = #{dicomTlsEnabled}, dicom_scp_timeout = #{dicomScpTimeout}, dicom_peers_json = #{dicomPeersJson}, worklists_enabled = #{worklistsEnabled}, worklists_database = #{worklistsDatabase}, plugins_paths = #{pluginsPaths}, is_active = #{isActive}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND is_active != 2

UPDATE hospital_dicom_servers SET username = #{username}, password = #{password}, http_server_enabled = TRUE, remote_access_allowed = TRUE, authentication_enabled = TRUE, authorization_enabled = TRUE, authorization_root = COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(authorization_root), ''), '/authorization'), authorization_checked_level = COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(authorization_checked_level), ''), 'studies'), modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND is_active = 1

UPDATE hospital_dicom_servers SET is_active = 2, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND is_active != 2 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg WHERE cfg.hospital_id = hospital_dicom_servers.hospital_id AND cfg.dicom_server_id = hospital_dicom_servers.id AND cfg.is_active = 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT( COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(h.abbr), ''), h.name, 'Hospital #' || h.id::text), ' / ', COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(m.abbr), ''), m.name, 'Modality #' || m.id::text), ' / ', COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(machine.machine_name), ''), 'Machine #' || machine.id::text), ' -> ', COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(s.name), ''), 'DICOM Server #' || s.id::text) ) AS usage FROM hospital_modality_server_routes route INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg ON cfg.id = route.routing_config_id AND cfg.hospital_id = route.hospital_id AND cfg.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = route.hospital_id INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = route.modality_id INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_machines machine ON machine.id = route.machine_id INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_servers s ON s.id = cfg.dicom_server_id WHERE route.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND cfg.dicom_server_id = #{dicomServerId} AND route.is_active = 1 ORDER BY usage ASC LIMIT 12
mapper.update: UPDATE hospital_dicom_servers SET pacs_result_api_key_hash = #{apiKeyHash}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND is_active != 2
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM hospital_dicom_machines machine INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = machine.hospital_id INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = machine.modality_id

SELECT
FROM hospital_dicom_machines machine INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = machine.hospital_id INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = machine.modality_id
ORDER BY machine.modality_id ASC, machine.machine_name ASC, machine.id DESC
LIMIT #{request.rowsPerPage} OFFSET #{request.page}

SELECT DISTINCT CONCAT( COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(h.abbr), ''), h.name, 'Hospital #' || h.id::text), ' / ', COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(m.abbr), ''), m.name, 'Modality #' || m.id::text), ' -> ', COALESCE(NULLIF(BTRIM(s.name), ''), 'DICOM Server #' || s.id::text) ) AS usage FROM hospital_modality_server_routes route INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg ON cfg.id = route.routing_config_id AND cfg.hospital_id = route.hospital_id AND cfg.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = route.hospital_id INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = route.modality_id INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_servers s ON s.id = cfg.dicom_server_id WHERE route.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND route.machine_id = #{machineId} AND route.is_active = 1 ORDER BY usage ASC LIMIT 12
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hospital_dicom_machines ( hospital_id, modality_id, machine_name, machine_ae_title, machine_host, machine_port, is_active, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{hospitalId}, #{modalityId}, #{machineName}, #{machineAeTitle}, #{machineHost}, #{machinePort}, 1, #{createdBy}, #{modifiedBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE hospital_dicom_machines SET modality_id = #{modalityId}, machine_name = #{machineName}, machine_ae_title = #{machineAeTitle}, machine_host = #{machineHost}, machine_port = #{machinePort}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND is_active != 2

UPDATE hospital_dicom_machines SET is_active = 2, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND is_active != 2 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hospital_modality_server_routes route WHERE route.hospital_id = hospital_dicom_machines.hospital_id AND route.machine_id = hospital_dicom_machines.id AND route.is_active = 1 )
mapper.sql:
WHERE cfg.is_active != 2
AND cfg.hospital_id = #{hospitalId}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hospital_modality_server_routes route_filter WHERE route_filter.routing_config_id = cfg.id AND route_filter.hospital_id = cfg.hospital_id AND route_filter.is_active = 1 AND route_filter.modality_id = #{request.modalityId} )
AND ( COALESCE(h.name, '') ILIKE '%' || #{request.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(cfg_server.name, '') ILIKE '%' || #{request.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(cfg_server.viewer_base_url, '') ILIKE '%' || #{request.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(cfg_server.ae_title, '') ILIKE '%' || #{request.searchText} || '%' OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hospital_modality_server_routes route_filter LEFT JOIN modalities modality_filter ON modality_filter.id = route_filter.modality_id LEFT JOIN hospital_dicom_machines machine_filter ON machine_filter.id = route_filter.machine_id AND machine_filter.hospital_id = route_filter.hospital_id WHERE route_filter.routing_config_id = cfg.id AND route_filter.hospital_id = cfg.hospital_id AND route_filter.is_active = 1 AND ( COALESCE(machine_filter.machine_name, '') ILIKE '%' || #{request.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(machine_filter.machine_ae_title, '') ILIKE '%' || #{request.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(machine_filter.machine_host, '') ILIKE '%' || #{request.searchText} || '%' OR COALESCE(modality_filter.name, '') ILIKE '%' || #{request.searchText} || '%' ) ) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM hospital_modality_server_routes r INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg ON cfg.id = r.routing_config_id AND cfg.hospital_id = r.hospital_id AND cfg.is_active != 2 INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = r.hospital_id INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = r.modality_id INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_servers s ON s.id = cfg.dicom_server_id INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_machines machine ON machine.id = r.machine_id

SELECT r.id AS id, r.public_id::text AS publicKey, r.routing_config_id AS routingConfigId, cfg.public_id::text AS routingConfigPublicKey, r.machine_id AS machineId, machine.public_id::text AS machinePublicKey, r.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, r.modality_id AS modalityId, m.public_id::text AS modalityPublicKey, m.name AS modalityName, m.abbr AS modalityAbbr, cfg.dicom_server_id AS dicomServerId, s.public_id::text AS dicomServerPublicKey, s.name AS dicomServerName, machine.machine_name AS machineName, machine.machine_ae_title AS machineAeTitle, machine.machine_host AS machineHost, machine.machine_port AS machinePort, s.ip_address AS ipAddress, s.port AS port, s.dicom_port AS dicomPort, s.ae_title AS aeTitle,
s.viewer_base_url AS viewerBaseUrl, s.pacs_api_callback_base_url AS pacsApiCallbackBaseUrl, s.username AS username, (s.password IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(s.password) != '') AS hasPassword, s.password AS password,
r.is_active AS isActive FROM hospital_modality_server_routes r INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg ON cfg.id = r.routing_config_id AND cfg.hospital_id = r.hospital_id AND cfg.is_active != 2 INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = r.hospital_id INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = r.modality_id INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_servers s ON s.id = cfg.dicom_server_id INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_machines machine ON machine.id = r.machine_id
ORDER BY r.id DESC
LIMIT #{request.rowsPerPage} OFFSET #{request.page}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT cfg.id) FROM hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = cfg.hospital_id LEFT JOIN hospital_dicom_servers cfg_server ON cfg_server.id = cfg.dicom_server_id AND cfg_server.hospital_id = cfg.hospital_id
SELECT id FROM hospital_dicom_routing_configs WHERE hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND is_active = 1 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hospital_dicom_routing_configs ( hospital_id, dicom_server_id, is_active, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{hospitalId}, #{dicomServerId}, 1, #{createdBy}, #{modifiedBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE hospital_dicom_routing_configs SET dicom_server_id = #{dicomServerId}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND is_active != 2
UPDATE hospital_dicom_routing_configs SET is_active = 2, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND is_active != 2

UPDATE hospital_modality_server_routes SET is_active = 2, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_at = NOW() WHERE routing_config_id = #{routingConfigId} AND hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND is_active != 2
mapper.select:
SELECT r.id AS id, r.public_id::text AS publicKey, r.routing_config_id AS routingConfigId, cfg.public_id::text AS routingConfigPublicKey, r.machine_id AS machineId, machine.public_id::text AS machinePublicKey, r.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, r.modality_id AS modalityId, m.public_id::text AS modalityPublicKey, m.name AS modalityName, m.abbr AS modalityAbbr, cfg.dicom_server_id AS dicomServerId, s.public_id::text AS dicomServerPublicKey, s.name AS dicomServerName, machine.machine_name AS machineName, machine.machine_ae_title AS machineAeTitle, machine.machine_host AS machineHost, machine.machine_port AS machinePort, s.ip_address AS ipAddress, s.port AS port, s.dicom_port AS dicomPort, s.ae_title AS aeTitle,
s.viewer_base_url AS viewerBaseUrl, s.pacs_api_callback_base_url AS pacsApiCallbackBaseUrl, s.username AS username, (s.password IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(s.password) != '') AS hasPassword, s.password AS password,
r.is_active AS isActive FROM hospital_modality_server_routes r INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg ON cfg.id = r.routing_config_id AND cfg.hospital_id = r.hospital_id AND cfg.is_active != 2 INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = r.hospital_id INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = r.modality_id INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_servers s ON s.id = cfg.dicom_server_id INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_machines machine ON machine.id = r.machine_id WHERE r.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND r.modality_id = #{modalityId} AND r.is_active != 2 ORDER BY r.id ASC

SELECT r.id AS id, r.public_id::text AS publicKey, r.routing_config_id AS routingConfigId, cfg.public_id::text AS routingConfigPublicKey, r.machine_id AS machineId, machine.public_id::text AS machinePublicKey, r.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, r.modality_id AS modalityId, m.public_id::text AS modalityPublicKey, m.name AS modalityName, m.abbr AS modalityAbbr, cfg.dicom_server_id AS dicomServerId, s.public_id::text AS dicomServerPublicKey, s.name AS dicomServerName, machine.machine_name AS machineName, machine.machine_ae_title AS machineAeTitle, machine.machine_host AS machineHost, machine.machine_port AS machinePort, s.ip_address AS ipAddress, s.port AS port, s.dicom_port AS dicomPort, s.ae_title AS aeTitle,
s.viewer_base_url AS viewerBaseUrl, s.pacs_api_callback_base_url AS pacsApiCallbackBaseUrl, s.username AS username, (s.password IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(s.password) != '') AS hasPassword, s.password AS password,
r.is_active AS isActive FROM hospital_modality_server_routes r INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg ON cfg.id = r.routing_config_id AND cfg.hospital_id = r.hospital_id AND cfg.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = r.hospital_id AND h.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = r.modality_id AND m.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_servers s ON s.id = cfg.dicom_server_id AND s.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_machines machine ON machine.id = r.machine_id AND machine.is_active = 1 WHERE r.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND r.modality_id = #{modalityId} AND r.is_active = 1 ORDER BY r.id ASC

SELECT r.id AS id, r.public_id::text AS publicKey, r.modality_id AS modalityId, m.public_id::text AS modalityPublicKey, m.name AS modalityName, m.abbr AS modalityCode, machine.public_id::text AS machinePublicKey, machine.machine_name AS machineName, s.public_id::text AS dicomServerPublicKey, s.name AS dicomServerName FROM hospital_modality_server_routes r INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg ON cfg.id = r.routing_config_id AND cfg.hospital_id = r.hospital_id AND cfg.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = r.modality_id AND m.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_servers s ON s.id = cfg.dicom_server_id AND s.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_machines machine ON machine.id = r.machine_id AND machine.is_active = 1 WHERE r.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND r.modality_id = #{modalityId} AND r.is_active = 1 ORDER BY machine.machine_name ASC, r.id ASC

SELECT s.id AS dicomServerId, s.public_id::text AS dicomServerPublicKey, s.name AS dicomServerName, COUNT(DISTINCT r.id)::bigint AS routeCount, COUNT(DISTINCT machine.id)::bigint AS machineCount FROM hospital_modality_server_routes r INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg ON cfg.id = r.routing_config_id AND cfg.hospital_id = r.hospital_id AND cfg.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = r.hospital_id AND h.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = r.modality_id AND m.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_servers s ON s.id = cfg.dicom_server_id AND s.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_machines machine ON machine.id = r.machine_id AND machine.is_active = 1 WHERE r.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND r.modality_id = #{modalityId} AND r.is_active = 1 GROUP BY s.id, s.public_id, s.name ORDER BY s.name ASC, s.id ASC

SELECT m.id AS value, m.public_id::text AS publicKey, CONCAT(COALESCE(NULLIF(m.abbr, ''), 'OT'), ' - ', m.name) AS label FROM hospital_modality_server_routes r INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg ON cfg.id = r.routing_config_id AND cfg.hospital_id = r.hospital_id AND cfg.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = r.hospital_id AND h.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospital_modalities hm ON hm.hospital_id = r.hospital_id AND hm.modality_id = r.modality_id AND hm.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = r.modality_id AND m.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_servers s ON s.id = cfg.dicom_server_id AND s.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_machines machine ON machine.id = r.machine_id AND machine.hospital_id = r.hospital_id AND machine.modality_id = r.modality_id AND machine.is_active = 1 WHERE r.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND r.is_active = 1 GROUP BY m.id, m.abbr, m.name ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(m.abbr, ''), 'OT') ASC, m.name ASC, m.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hospital_modality_server_routes ( routing_config_id, hospital_id, modality_id, machine_id, is_active, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{routingConfigId}, #{hospitalId}, #{modalityId}, #{machineId}, 1, #{createdBy}, #{modifiedBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select:
SELECT s.id AS id, s.public_id::text AS publicKey, s.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, s.name AS name, s.ip_address AS ipAddress, s.port AS port, s.dicom_port AS dicomPort, s.ae_title AS aeTitle,
s.viewer_base_url AS viewerBaseUrl, s.pacs_api_callback_base_url AS pacsApiCallbackBaseUrl, s.username AS username, (s.password IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(s.password) != '') AS hasPassword, s.password AS password,
route_info.modality_id_csv AS modalityIdCsv, route_info.modality_public_key_csv AS modalityPublicKeyCsv, route_info.modality_name_csv AS modalityNameCsv, s.is_active AS isActive, TO_CHAR(s.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(s.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS modifiedAt FROM pacs_worklists q LEFT JOIN hospital_modality_server_routes selected_route ON selected_route.id = q.dicom_route_id AND selected_route.hospital_id = q.hospital_id LEFT JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs selected_cfg ON selected_cfg.id = selected_route.routing_config_id AND selected_cfg.hospital_id = selected_route.hospital_id AND selected_cfg.is_active = 1 LEFT JOIN pacs_worklist_study_links qsl ON qsl.hospital_id = q.hospital_id AND qsl.worklist_id = q.id AND qsl.is_primary = 1 LEFT JOIN pacs_studies study ON study.hospital_id = q.hospital_id AND study.id = COALESCE(q.study_id, qsl.study_id) AND study.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_servers s ON s.id = COALESCE(selected_cfg.dicom_server_id, study.dicom_server_id) AND s.hospital_id = q.hospital_id INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = s.hospital_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT STRING_AGG(DISTINCT r.modality_id::text, ',' ORDER BY r.modality_id::text) AS modality_id_csv, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT m.public_id::text, ',' ORDER BY m.public_id::text) AS modality_public_key_csv, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT m.name, ',' ORDER BY m.name) AS modality_name_csv FROM hospital_modality_server_routes r INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg ON cfg.id = r.routing_config_id AND cfg.hospital_id = r.hospital_id AND cfg.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = r.modality_id AND m.is_active = 1 WHERE r.hospital_id = s.hospital_id AND cfg.dicom_server_id = s.id AND r.is_active = 1 ) route_info ON TRUE WHERE q.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND q.id = #{worklistId} AND s.is_active = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id AS id, s.public_id::text AS publicKey, s.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, s.name AS name, s.ip_address AS ipAddress, s.port AS port, s.dicom_port AS dicomPort, s.ae_title AS aeTitle,
s.viewer_base_url AS viewerBaseUrl, s.pacs_api_callback_base_url AS pacsApiCallbackBaseUrl, s.username AS username, (s.password IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(s.password) != '') AS hasPassword, s.password AS password,
route_info.modality_id_csv AS modalityIdCsv, route_info.modality_public_key_csv AS modalityPublicKeyCsv, route_info.modality_name_csv AS modalityNameCsv, s.is_active AS isActive, TO_CHAR(s.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(s.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS modifiedAt FROM hospital_dicom_servers s INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = s.hospital_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT STRING_AGG(DISTINCT r.modality_id::text, ',' ORDER BY r.modality_id::text) AS modality_id_csv, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT m.public_id::text, ',' ORDER BY m.public_id::text) AS modality_public_key_csv, STRING_AGG(DISTINCT m.name, ',' ORDER BY m.name) AS modality_name_csv FROM hospital_modality_server_routes r INNER JOIN hospital_dicom_routing_configs cfg ON cfg.id = r.routing_config_id AND cfg.hospital_id = r.hospital_id AND cfg.is_active = 1 INNER JOIN modalities m ON m.id = r.modality_id AND m.is_active = 1 WHERE r.hospital_id = s.hospital_id AND cfg.dicom_server_id = s.id AND r.is_active = 1 ) route_info ON TRUE WHERE s.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND s.is_active = 1 AND UPPER(TRIM(s.ae_title)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{aeTitle})) ORDER BY s.id ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id AS id, s.public_id::text AS publicKey, s.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, s.name AS name, s.ip_address AS ipAddress, s.port AS port, s.dicom_port AS dicomPort, s.ae_title AS aeTitle,
s.viewer_base_url AS viewerBaseUrl, s.pacs_api_callback_base_url AS pacsApiCallbackBaseUrl, s.username AS username, (s.password IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(s.password) != '') AS hasPassword, s.password AS password,
s.is_active AS isActive, TO_CHAR(s.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(s.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS modifiedAt FROM hospital_dicom_servers s INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = s.hospital_id WHERE s.is_active = 1 AND s.username IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(s.username) != '' AND LOWER(BTRIM(s.username)) = LOWER(BTRIM(#{username})) ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT s.id AS id, s.public_id::text AS publicKey, s.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, s.name AS name, s.ip_address AS ipAddress, s.port AS port, s.dicom_port AS dicomPort, s.ae_title AS aeTitle,
s.viewer_base_url AS viewerBaseUrl, s.pacs_api_callback_base_url AS pacsApiCallbackBaseUrl, s.username AS username, (s.password IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(s.password) != '') AS hasPassword, s.password AS password,
s.is_active AS isActive, TO_CHAR(s.created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createdAt, TO_CHAR(s.modified_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS modifiedAt FROM hospital_dicom_servers s INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = s.hospital_id WHERE s.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND s.is_active = 1 ORDER BY s.id ASC

SELECT s.id AS id, s.public_id::text AS publicKey, s.hospital_id AS hospitalId, h.public_id::text AS hospitalPublicKey, h.name AS hospitalName, s.name AS name, s.ip_address AS ipAddress, s.port AS port, s.dicom_port AS dicomPort, s.ae_title AS aeTitle,
s.public_health_check_url AS publicHealthCheckUrl, s.username AS username, s.password AS password, s.ssl_enabled AS sslEnabled, s.is_active AS isActive FROM hospital_dicom_servers s INNER JOIN hospitals h ON h.id = s.hospital_id WHERE s.is_active = 1 AND h.is_active = 1
AND s.hospital_id = #{hospitalId}
ORDER BY h.name ASC, s.name ASC, s.id ASC
